tasks.facts: Email my boss Daniel: the Atlas migration slips two weeks, new date is the 28th. We found out Tuesday the vendor API docs were wrong. Goal: keep his confidence.
constraints: New date (the 28th) in the first sentence.
State the cause factually, no groveling.

tasks.facts: Convince our leadership team to fund a second SRE. We had 14 incidents last quarter. On-call is burning people out. Jenna almost quit.
constraints: The ask in the first two sentences.
Use the 14-incidents figure and the Jenna detail as given.

tasks.facts: Rewrite so it sounds human: 'In today's rapidly evolving landscape, it's worth noting that our robust solution doesn't just streamline workflows - it transforms them. The implementation of our platform facilitates seamless collaboration, enhances productivity, and unlocks innovation.'
constraints: No invented statistics — flag or placeholder missing specifics.

tasks.facts: Short note to my team kicking off a boring but necessary two-week tech-debt sprint. Morale is low after a rough quarter.
constraints: Lead with why it matters to them.
Acknowledge the rough quarter specifically, no hollow cheerleading.
